transcript: But one challenge stops them in their tracks. A giant petrel. They try to flee, but running isn't an emperor's strong point. A slip is all the petrel needs. The chick is grabbed by his neck feathers but the down just falls away they form a defensive circle and prepare to stand their ground despite their chicklike appearance, they are close to a meter tall. Quite a size, even for a giant petrel. The chick towers to full height, protecting those behind. His defiance buys time it's a standoff then as if from nowhere an Adelie the feistiest penguin in the world. He fearlessly puts himself between the chicks and the petrel. Even petrels don't mess with Adélie's. Their plucky rescuer accompanies the chicks to the sea.
